I'd like to personally welcome you and Helena to our Grade 4 Honors class at Think Academy! My name is Teacher Omar, and I have a few important notes for you as a new family.

1) Intake Phone Call or Form

I have some intake questions I’d like to ask to get to know Helena better and develop a customized learning plan to help reach your goals. I would also love to answer any questions you may have for me. Please schedule a 15-minute parent-teacher phone call with me here: https://calendly.com/os-tutoring/parent-chat-clone. Note that these calls will be in English only, as I am still learning Mandarin!

If you would prefer, you can answer these intake questions via a form linked here: https://forms.gle/citeKWa84UNa2WXb7. The form is written in English and Mandarin Chinese, and can take answers in both languages. Note that you do not need to complete the form AND schedule a phone call unless you’d prefer to do so. The questions on the form are the same ones I will ask during the call.
notes: Helena was a new student trying out the class. Be extra warm and friendly!
